title: Did Google Just Fall Behind Again?, WWDC Preview, Anthropic Files To Go Public
summary: Alex Kantrowitz and M.G. Siegler discuss whether Google is losing AI leadership to OpenAI and Anthropic as coding agents and super-apps become competitive advantages. The episode covers AI agents reshaping web, email, and app usage, Apple's WWDC plans, and Anthropic's IPO filing.
